data.name: Lust Night💋
data.detailed_description:
The game is a thrilling journey of passion, lust, fear, terror and mystery - you play as Jacob, and you and your friends are trapped in a spooky mansion filled with dark secrets. Every step you take shapes the unfolding story, leading to unexpected encounters and deepening the eerie mystery that surrounds you.

Graduation party turns into a nightmare for a few young students when they gather in an abandoned house on the edge of town, yet to discover the sinister secrets within. A simple exploration turns into a terrifying experience for Jacob and his friends. Trapped inside the place, they have to confront the voice from the darkness, and solve a decades-old murder to survive.

A tormented ghost haunts the house - her tragic past forces the group to confront their deepest fears and navigate a maze of supernatural dangers, complicated relationships and temptations. Explore room after room, find the secrets of the house's disturbing past and beware – your choices not only affect Jacob’s fate but also the lives of those around him.

Will you uncover the truth behind all of this, or will you fall prey to the local dark forces? Progress through the story, get to know your friends better and find out their true desires. Your choices could mean life or death. Can you solve the murder and chill out the ghost, or will you end up as another victim?

Features:

  • Mature content - enjoy beautiful 18+ scenes as you dive deeper into the story and explore the characters.🔞
  • Dark atmosphere - mysterious, haunting vibes await! 🔦
  • Thrilling plot - solve the mysteries of this haunted place and dive into the passionate relationship.📗
  • Beautiful graphics - attentively crafted 3D environments and characters will help you immerse into the experience.✨
  • Player choice - decisions you make will determine the way that plot goes and lead to multiple endings.💭

    Enter Lust Night💋 and discover what really haunts the darkness!

data.short_description: Lust Night💋 invites you to step into a mysterious world, blending elements of horror and romance in this captivating adult visual novel. A group of friends finds themselves trapped in a cursed house, then murder comes onto the scene and a game for their lives begins!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOs

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux

Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or above

  • Graphics: Direct X compatible
